84:   const trimmed = input.trim().replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/^\.\//, '').replace(/\/+$/, '');
85:   return trimmed || null;
86: }

88: function buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload: {
89:   provider: string;
90:   retry: { maxRetries: number };
91:   validation: { runBuildIfPresent: boolean; runTestsIfPresent: boolean };
92:   autoFix: { rehydrateBaseline: boolean; bootstrapToolchain: boolean };
93:   toolchain: { manager: string | null; version: string | null };
94:   cache: { dependencyCache: boolean };
95:   deploy: { outputDir: string | null };
96:   rollbackOnFailure: boolean;
97:   provenance: { trigger: string; taskId: string | null; operationId: string | null; note: string | null };
98: }): Record<string, unknown> {
99:   const payload: Record<string, unknown> = {
100:     provider: requestPayload.provider,
101:     retry: requestPayload.retry,
102:     validation: requestPayload.validation,
103:     rollbackOnFailure: requestPayload.rollbackOnFailure,
104:     provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
105:   };
106: 
107:   if (requestPayload.autoFix.rehydrateBaseline || requestPayload.autoFix.bootstrapToolchain) {
108:     payload.autoFix = requestPayload.autoFix;
109:   }
110: 
111:   if (requestPayload.toolchain.manager || requestPayload.toolchain.version) {
112:     payload.toolchain = requestPayload.toolchain;
113:   }
114: 
115:   if (!requestPayload.cache.dependencyCache) {
116:     payload.cache = requestPayload.cache;
117:   }
118: 
119:   if (requestPayload.deploy.outputDir) {
120:     payload.deploy = requestPayload.deploy;
121:   }
122: 
123:   return payload;
124: }

126: function nextActionForDeploymentError(code: string | undefined): string | null {
127:   switch (code) {
128:     case 'toolchain_detect_failed':
129:       return 'Verify package.json and lockfile metadata, then retry deploy.';
130:     case 'corepack_missing':
131:       return 'Use a sandbox image with corepack available, or switch to npm toolchain.';
132:     case 'package_manager_bootstrap_failed':
133:       return 'Confirm the requested package manager version is valid and retry deploy.';
134:     case 'validation_tool_missing':
135:       return 'Disable build/test validation for this deploy or install required tooling in the sandbox image.';
136:     case 'validation_command_failed':
137:       return 'Review test/build output, fix project errors, and retry deploy.';
138:     case 'invalid_project_root':
139:       return 'Set workspace source project root to a safe relative path and retry deploy.';
140:     case 'baseline_missing':
141:     case 'baseline_rehydrate_failed':
142:       return 'Reset the workspace and retry deploy to rebuild git baseline.';
143:     case 'potential_secrets_detected':
144:       return 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying (template files like .env.example are allowed).';
145:     case 'provider_auth_failed':
146:       return 'Verify CF_ACCOUNT_ID and CF_API_TOKEN, then rerun preflight.';
147:     case 'provider_scope_missing':
148:       return 'Grant Workers Scripts/Routes edit scope to CF_API_TOKEN and rerun preflight.';
149:     case 'provider_project_not_found':
150:       return 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to an existing Workers project and retry.';
151:     case 'provider_rate_limited':
152:       return 'Retry deploy after Cloudflare rate limits reset.';
153:     case 'provider_invalid_output_dir':
154:       return 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build directory (for example dist or out) and retry.';
155:     case 'provider_deploy_failed':
156:       return 'Check provider deployment logs and retry after fixing configuration or build output.';
157:     default:
158:       return null;
159:   }

162: async function sha256Hex(input: string): Promise<string> {
163:   const digest = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', new TextEncoder().encode(input));
164:   return Array.from(new Uint8Array(digest))
165:     .map((byte) => byte.toString(16).padStart(2, '0'))
166:     .join('');
167: }

213: export async function handleCreateWorkspaceDeployment(
214:   workspaceId: string,
215:   request: Request,
216:   env: Env,
217:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
218: ): Promise<Response> {
219:   try {
220:     const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
221:     if (enabled) {
222:       return enabled;
223:     }
224: 
225:     const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
226:     if (workspaceCheck) {
227:       return workspaceCheck;
228:     }
229: 
230:     if (!env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE && !ctx) {
231:       return jsonResponse(
232:         {
233:           error: 'Workspace deployment runner is unavailable',
234:           code: 'workspace_deploy_runner_unavailable',
235:         },
236:         503
237:       );
238:     }
239: 
240:     const idempotencyKey = (request.headers.get('Idempotency-Key') ?? '').trim();
241:     if (!idempotencyKey) {
242:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required Idempotency-Key header' }, 400);
243:     }
244: 
245:     const payloadRaw = await request.text();
246:     let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
247:     if (payloadRaw.trim()) {
248:       const parsed = JSON.parse(payloadRaw) as unknown;
249:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
250:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
251:       }
252:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
253:     }
254: 
255:     const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
256:     const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
257:     if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
258:       return jsonResponse(
259:         {
260:           error: providerConfigError,
261:           code: 'provider_config_invalid',
262:         },
263:         400
264:       );
265:     }
266:     if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
267:       return jsonResponse(
268:         {
269:           error: 'Unsupported deployment provider',
270:           code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider',
271:           allowedProviders: ['simulated', 'cloudflare_workers_assets'],
272:         },
273:         400
274:       );
275:     }
276:     const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
277:     const retry =
278:       payload.retry && typeof payload.retry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.retry)
279:         ? (payload.retry as Record<string, unknown>)
280:         : {};
281:     const validation =
282:       payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
283:         ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
284:         : {};
285:     const provenance =
286:       payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
287:         ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
288:         : {};
289:     const autoFix =
290:       payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
291:         ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
292:         : {};
293:     const toolchain =
294:       payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
295:         ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
296:         : {};
297:     const cache =
298:       payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
299:         ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
300:         : {};
301:     const deploy =
302:       payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
303:         ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
304:         : {};
305:     const maxRetries = parseInteger(retry.maxRetries, 2, 0, 5);
306:     const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
307: 
308:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
309:       return jsonResponse(
310:         {
311:           error: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider and must be a safe relative directory',
312:           code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
313:         },
314:         400
315:       );
316:     }
317: 
318:     const requestPayload = {
319:       provider,
320:       retry: {
321:         maxRetries,
322:       },
323:       validation: {
324:         runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
325:         runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
326:       },
327:       autoFix: {
328:         rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
329:         bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
330:       },
331:       toolchain: {
332:         manager: typeof toolchain.manager === 'string' && toolchain.manager.trim() ? toolchain.manager.trim() : null,
333:         version: typeof toolchain.version === 'string' && toolchain.version.trim() ? toolchain.version.trim() : null,
334:       },
335:       cache: {
336:         dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
337:       },
338:       deploy: {
339:         outputDir,
340:       },
341:       rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true),
342:       provenance: {
343:         trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' && provenance.trigger.trim() ? provenance.trigger.trim() : 'manual',
344:         taskId: typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' && provenance.taskId.trim() ? provenance.taskId.trim() : null,
345:         operationId:
346:           typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' && provenance.operationId.trim() ? provenance.operationId.trim() : null,
347:         note: typeof provenance.note === 'string' && provenance.note.trim() ? provenance.note.trim() : null,
348:       },
349:     };
350: 
351:     const requestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(
352:       JSON.stringify(buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload))
353:     );
354: 
355:     const created = await createWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, {
356:       id: generateWorkspaceDeploymentId(),
357:       workspaceId,
358:       provider,
359:       idempotencyKey,
360:       requestPayload,
361:       requestPayloadSha256,
362:       maxRetries,
363:       provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
364:     });
365: 
366:     if (!created.reused) {
367:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
368:         workspaceId,
369:         deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
370:         eventType: 'deployment_created',
371:         payload: {
372:           provider,
373:           maxRetries,
374:           provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
375:         },
376:       });
377:     }
378: 
379:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && created.deployment.status === 'queued') {
380:       const hasPrecheckPassed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
381:         env.DB,
382:         workspaceId,
383:         created.deployment.id,
384:         'deployment_provider_precheck_passed'
385:       );
386:       const hasPrecheckFailed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
387:         env.DB,
388:         workspaceId,
389:         created.deployment.id,
390:         'deployment_provider_precheck_failed'
391:       );
392:       const alreadyEnqueued = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
393:         env.DB,
394:         workspaceId,
395:         created.deployment.id,
396:         'deployment_enqueued'
397:       );
398: 
399:       if (hasPrecheckFailed) {
400:         return jsonResponse(
401:           {
402:             error: created.deployment.error?.message ?? 'Provider precheck previously failed',
403:             code: created.deployment.error?.code ?? 'provider_deploy_failed',
404:           },
405:           400
406:         );
407:       }
408: 
409:       if (!hasPrecheckPassed && !alreadyEnqueued) {
410:         const claimTime = new Date().toISOString();
411:         const precheckLeaseCutoff = new Date(Date.now() - PROVIDER_PRECHECK_LEASE_MS).toISOString();
412:         const claimed = await env.DB
413:           .prepare(
414:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
415:              SET error_code = 'provider_precheck_running',
416:                  error_message = 'Provider precheck in progress',
417:                  updated_at = ?
418:              WHERE id = ?
419:                AND workspace_id = ?
420:                AND status = 'queued'
421:                AND (
422:                  error_code IS NULL
423:                  OR error_code = 'retry_scheduled'
424:                  OR (error_code = 'provider_precheck_running' AND updated_at <= ?)
425:                )`
426:           )
427:           .bind(claimTime, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, precheckLeaseCutoff)
428:           .run();
429: 
430:         if ((claimed.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
431:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
432:           if (concurrent) {
433:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, deploymentCreateResponseStatus(concurrent.status, true));
434:           }
435:         }
436: 
437:         let precheckChecks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
438:         try {
439:           precheckChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
440:         } catch (error) {
441:           const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
442:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
443:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
444:             .prepare(
445:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
446:                SET status = 'failed',
447:                    error_code = ?,
448:                    error_message = ?,
449:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
450:                    updated_at = ?
451:                WHERE id = ?
452:                  AND workspace_id = ?
453:                  AND status = 'queued'
454:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
455:                  AND updated_at = ?`
456:             )
457:             .bind(providerError.code, providerError.message, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
458:             .run();
459: 
460:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
461:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
462:               workspaceId,
463:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
464:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
465:               payload: {
466:                 code: providerError.code,
467:                 message: providerError.message,
468:               },
469:             });
470:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
471:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
472:               status: 'failed',
473:               errorCode: providerError.code,
474:               errorMessage: providerError.message,
475:             });
476:             return jsonResponse({ error: providerError.message, code: providerError.code }, 400);
477:           }
478: 
479:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
480:           if (concurrent) {
481:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, deploymentCreateResponseStatus(concurrent.status, true));
482:           }
483: 
484:           throw error;
485:         }
486: 
487:         const failed = precheckChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
488:         if (failed) {
489:           const failureMessage = failed.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed';
490:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
491:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
492:             .prepare(
493:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
494:                SET status = 'failed',
495:                    error_code = ?,
496:                    error_message = ?,
497:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
498:                    updated_at = ?
499:                WHERE id = ?
500:                  AND workspace_id = ?
501:                  AND status = 'queued'
502:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
503:                  AND updated_at = ?`
504:             )
505:             .bind(failed.code, failureMessage, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
506:             .run();
507: 
508:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
509:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
510:               workspaceId,
511:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
512:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
513:               payload: {
514:                 code: failed.code,
515:                 message: failureMessage,
516:               },
517:             });
518:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
519:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
520:               status: 'failed',
521:               errorCode: failed.code,
522:               errorMessage: failureMessage,
523:             });
524:             return jsonResponse({ error: failureMessage, code: failed.code }, 400);
525:           }
526: 
527:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
528:           if (concurrent) {
529:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, deploymentCreateResponseStatus(concurrent.status, true));
530:           }
531: 
532:           throw new Error('Provider precheck failed but deployment record was not available for response');
533:         }
534: 
535:         const clearClaim = await env.DB
536:           .prepare(
537:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
538:              SET error_code = NULL,
539:                  error_message = NULL,
540:                  updated_at = ?
541:              WHERE id = ?
542:                AND workspace_id = ?
543:                AND status = 'queued'
544:                AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
545:                AND updated_at = ?`
546:           )
547:           .bind(new Date().toISOString(), created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
548:           .run();
549: 
550:         if ((clearClaim.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
551:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
552:           if (concurrent) {
553:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, deploymentCreateResponseStatus(concurrent.status, true));
554:           }
555:         }
556: 
557:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
558:           workspaceId,
559:           deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
560:           eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_passed',
561:           payload: {
562:             checks: precheckChecks,
563:           },
564:         });
565:       }
566:     }
567: 
568:     const latestDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
569:     const deploymentForQueue = latestDeployment ?? created.deployment;
570: 
571:     if (deploymentForQueue.status === 'queued') {
572:       const hasEnqueuedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
573:         env.DB,
574:         workspaceId,
575:         deploymentForQueue.id,
576:         'deployment_enqueued'
577:       );
578:       const shouldRecoverQueued = created.reused && deploymentForQueue.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled';
579:       const hasRecoveredReenqueue = shouldRecoverQueued
580:         ? await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered')
581:         : false;
582: 
583:       if (!hasEnqueuedEvent || (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue)) {
584:         if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE) {
585:           await env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE.send(
586:             createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id)
587:           );
588:         } else if (ctx) {
589:           ctx.waitUntil(
590:             runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, deploymentForQueue.maxRetries + 1)
591:           );
592:         }
593: 
594:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
595:           workspaceId,
596:           deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
597:           eventType: 'deployment_enqueued',
598:           payload: {
599:             mode: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'queue' : 'inline',
600:             reused: created.reused,
601:           },
602:         });
603: 
604:         if (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue) {
605:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
606:             workspaceId,
607:             deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
608:             eventType: 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered',
609:             payload: {
610:               reason: 'retry_scheduled_replay',
611:             },
612:           });
613:         }
614:       }
615:     }
616: 
617:     const responseStatus = deploymentCreateResponseStatus(deploymentForQueue.status, created.reused);
618:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: deploymentForQueue }, responseStatus);
619:   } catch (error) {
620:     if (error instanceof WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError) {
621:       return jsonResponse(
622:         {
623:           error: 'Idempotency key has already been used with different payload',
624:           code: 'idempotency_key_conflict',
625:         },
626:         409
627:       );
628:     }
629: 
630:     if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {
631:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
632:     }
633: 
634:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
635:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to create workspace deployment: ${message}` }, 500);
636:   }
637: }

639: export async function handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
640:   workspaceId: string,
641:   request: Request,
642:   env: Env
643: ): Promise<Response> {
644:   const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
645:   if (enabled) {
646:     return enabled;
647:   }
648: 
649:   const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
650:   if (workspaceCheck) {
651:     return workspaceCheck;
652:   }
653: 
654:   let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
655:   try {
656:     const raw = await request.text();
657:     if (raw.trim()) {
658:       const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
659:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
660:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
661:       }
662:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
663:     }
664:   } catch {
665:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
666:   }
667: 
668:   const validation =
669:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
670:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
671:       : {};
672:   const autoFix =
673:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
674:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
675:       : {};
676:   const deploy =
677:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
678:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
679:       : {};
680:   const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
681:   const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
682:   if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
683:     return jsonResponse(
684:       {
685:         preflight: {
686:           ok: false,
687:           toolchain: null,
688:           checks: [{ code: 'provider_config_invalid', ok: false, details: providerConfigError }],
689:           remediations: [],
690:         },
691:         nextAction: 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER to simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets and retry preflight.',
692:       },
693:       200
694:     );
695:   }
696:   if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
697:     return jsonResponse(
698:       {
699:         preflight: {
700:           ok: false,
701:           toolchain: null,
702:           checks: [{ code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider', ok: false, details: `Unsupported provider: ${providerInput}` }],
703:           remediations: [],
704:         },
705:         nextAction: 'Use provider=cloudflare_workers_assets or provider=simulated.',
706:       },
707:       200
708:     );

- **Blocker 1 (`cancel_requested` + stale path can force wrong terminal state):** In `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1571`–`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1574`, a `running` deployment that is stale and has `cancelRequestedAt` is unconditionally transitioned to `cancelled` via `markDeploymentCancelled(...)` without checking provider terminal status. This is unsafe when provider cancellation was previously rejected (`deployment_cancel_rejected`) or still pending: local state becomes terminal `cancelled` while remote deployment can still succeed/fail later, breaking terminal-state monotonicity and cancel/retry race correctness.

- **Blocker 2 (idempotent replay can fail an already-created provider deployment before resume):** In `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:822`–`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:837`, provider precheck runs before the resume/create split at `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1157`. For replay/retry cases where `providerDeploymentId` already exists, a precheck failure short-circuits into `PolicyError` and terminal `failed`, instead of reconciling the existing provider deployment. This breaks idempotent replay semantics (replay should reconcile existing remote state, not re-gate on precheck).
